source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for crisp alert dashboards with Noto Sans guidance for Japanese labels, compact numerals, and clear incident-table scanning.
layout: 8px grid, sharp wing-like dividers, pouch-red status chips, black header bars, sky-cyan focus rings, compact panels, and high-contrast dashboard workflows.

prompts.label: Transparent frigatebird pouch motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Frigatebird transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated frigatebird pouch motif on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for transparency removal.
Subject: A dramatic frigatebird-inspired cutout combining a glossy black angular wing silhouette, long forked tail hint, and an inflated vivid red throat pouch as the central alert signal form; accurate seabird feather texture, crisp black wing edges, subtle charcoal and blue-black iridescence, tropical sky reflection highlights, premium product-system feel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full black wing shape and red throat pouch without cropping; no environment, no props, no text.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving black wing detail, red throat pouch saturation, sharp alert-system contrast, and fine feather texture.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 only. One uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no landscape, no other birds, no flowers, no watermark, no text, no random brand names.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 light-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Frigatebird" / "Frigatebird" using the motif of a frigatebird pouch, black wings, red throat signal, and tropical sky tones.
Visual identity: dramatic alert UI, glossy black wing surfaces, vivid red inflated throat pouch as primary signal, tropical sky cyan, pale cloud white, storm charcoal, volcanic black, precise operational dashboard polish. The system should feel like a high-attention monitoring product for incidents and live status.
Required board sections with large readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, top navigation and left sidebar, dashboard analytics with charts, incident table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, sharp wing-like dividers, red pouch alert chips, black wing header bars, sky-blue focus rings, cloud-white cards, charcoal borders, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic product UI terms such as Overview, Alerts, Status, Critical, Active, Pending, Resolved, Signal Load, Uptime, Incidents, Response, Form, Table, Search.
Palette names visible: Wing Black #0b0d10, Pouch Red #e3312d, Sky Cyan #5eb8d5, Cloud White #f6fbfc, Storm Charcoal #252b31, Signal Amber #f0a33a, Lagoon Teal #2d8f9b, Ash Border #a9b4ba, Deep Night #06080a.
Composition: crisp editorial design-system sheet, enough whitespace for legibility, no tiny unreadable token tables, no photographic background; motif cutout shown as a small reference element.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no other animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon cyberpunk, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.
